claim: FedRAMP High baseline systems must remediate critical-severity vulnerabilities within fifteen days of detection.
source_clauses: FedRAMP High baseline systems must remediate critical-severity vulnerabilities within fifteen days of detection.
High-severity vulnerabilities carry a thirty-day remediation window.

claim: Audit records must be retained online for at least ninety days and archived for a minimum of one year.
source_clauses: Audit records must be retained online for at least ninety days and archived for a minimum of one year.
Archived audit records support after-the-fact incident investigation.

claim: All privileged account access must be authenticated with phishing-resistant multi-factor authentication.
source_clauses: All privileged account access must be authenticated with phishing-resistant multi-factor authentication.
Privileged accounts are reviewed for continued need every thirty days.

claim: Devices must initiate a session lock after fifteen minutes of user inactivity.
source_clauses: Devices must initiate a session lock after fifteen minutes of user inactivity.
Session locks remain in effect until the user re-authenticates.

claim: The incident response capability must be tested at least every six months.
source_clauses: The incident response capability must be tested at least every six months.
Test results inform updates to the incident response plan.

claim: Information system backups of user-level data must be conducted at least daily.
source_clauses: Information system backups of user-level data must be conducted at least daily.
Backup copies are stored at an alternate site geographically separated from the primary.
